prediction: The DHT22 humidity sensor (GPIO 14 on ESP32) will show a measurable upward drift in humidity readings over the next 7 days (from 96.1% toward 99%+), because DHT22 sensors drift upward over time in stable-temperature environments. rationale: DHT22 sensors are known to drift upward in humidity readings over time, especially in stable-temperature environments where the sensor has no drying cycle. If drift is confirmed, it would be a useful calibration signal for the embodied cognition system.
